title: EARLY INTERVENTION - 211info
text: TUCKER MAXON SCHOOL EARLY INTERVENTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Focuses on developing collaborative partnerships with parents and children that facilitate spoken language development through listening. Offers intensive auditory-oral intervention, on-site audiologist who does hearing aid analysis and cochlear implant mapping, regular home and school sessions, facilitated toddler groups with both children with typical hearing and children who are deaf and support and information for families. 2860 SE Holgate Boulevard Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Newborns to age 3 with a hearing impairment Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (503) 235-6551 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 235-6551 Main phone Main phone (503) 235-6551 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Audiological Evaluations Children's Play Groups * Deafness Disability Related Parenting Programs * Deafness Early Intervention for Children with Disabilities/Delays * Deafness Evaluation for Assistive Technology * Deafness Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - TUCKER MAXON SCHOOL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TUCKER MAXON SCHOOL
